config/_default/config.toml:
baseURL = "https://your-domain.pages.dev/" # Тимчасовий домен Cloudflare
languageCode = "en-us"
title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub"
timeout = "45s"
defaultContentLanguage = "en"
defaultContentLanguageInSubdir = true

# КРИТИЧНІ НАЛАШТУВАННЯ ДЛЯ SEO 100/100
relativeURLs = false    # ПРИМУСОВО ВИМИКАЄМО: для коректних hreflang
canonifyURLs = true     # ПРИМУСОВО ВМИКАЄМО: робимо всі посилання абсолютними

[module]
  [[module.imports]]
    path = "github.com/jpanther/congo/v2"

[outputs]
  home = ["HTML", "RSS", "JSON"]

[taxonomies]
  category = "categories"
  tag = "tags"
  series = "series"
config/_default/languages.toml:
[en]
  languageName = "English"
  contentDir = "content/en"   # ІЗОЛЯЦІЯ: Англійська
  locale = "en-US"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub"
  weight = 1
  [en.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "blue"

[uk]
  languageName = "Українська"
  contentDir = "content/uk"  # ІЗОЛЯЦІЯ: Українська
  locale = "uk-UA"
  title = "Маркетинговий Хаб Congo"
  weight = 2
  [uk.params]
    author = { name = "Маркетинговий Хаб" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "yellow"

[de]
  languageName = "Deutsch"
  contentDir = "content/de"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "de-DE"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub (DE)"
  weight = 3
  [de.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "slate"

[fr]
  languageName = "Français"
  contentDir = "content/fr"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "fr-FR"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub (FR)"
  weight = 4
  [fr.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "blue"

[es]
  languageName = "Español"
  contentDir = "content/es"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "es-ES"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub (ES)"
  weight = 5
  [es.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "orange"

[ru]
  languageName = "Русский"
  contentDir = "content/ru"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "ru-RU"
  title = "Маркетинговий Хаб Congo"
  weight = 6
  [ru.params]
    author = { name = "Маркетинговий Хаб" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "red"

[zh]
  languageName = "中文"
  contentDir = "content/zh"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "zh-CN"
  title = "Congo 企业 mkt 中心"
  weight = 7
  [zh.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "emerald"

[tr]
  languageName = "Türkçe"
  contentDir = "content/tr"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "tr-TR"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub (TR)"
  weight = 8
  [tr.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "orange"

[ga]
  languageName = "Gaeilge"
  contentDir = "content/ga"  # ДОДАНО contentDir
  locale = "ga-IE"
  title = "Congo Enterprise Marketing Hub (GA)"
  weight = 9
  [ga.params]
    author = { name = "Marketing Hub" }
    header = { showLanguageChooser = true }
    color = "green"
config/_default/params.toml:
[params]
color = "blue"
font = "sans"
logo = "logo.png"
homepage = "posts"

[params.meta]
robots = "index, follow"

[params.social]
twitter = "marketing_hub"
github = "congo-hub"
linkedin = "company/marketing-hub"

[params.header]
showLanguageChooser = true
showSearch = true

[params.footer]
showCopyright = true
showPoweredBy = true
static/admin/config.yml:
# =====================================================================
# SVELTIA CMS — CLOUDFLARE & CODESPACES OPTIMIZED CONFIG
# =====================================================================
backend:
  name: github
  repo: 9315223-cyber/1705
  branch: main
# ВАЖЛИВО: local_backend видалено, Sveltia використовує іншу логіку для локальної роботи
# site_url та display_url залишаємо порожніми, щоб вони автоматично 
# адаптувалися під Codespaces або Cloudflare Pages
site_url: ""
display_url: ""

media_folder: "static/images/uploads"
public_folder: "/images/uploads"

i18n:
  structure: multiple_folders
  locales: [en, uk, de, fr, es, ru, zh, tr, ga]
  default_locale: en

collections:
  - name: "posts"
    label: "Блог / Пости"
    folder: "content/{{locale}}/posts"
    create: true
    fields:
      - { label: "Заголовок", name: "title", widget: "string" }
      - { label: "Дата", name: "date", widget: "datetime" }
      - { label: "Текст", name: "body", widget: "markdown" }
